---
title: "Take-home Exercise 2"
author: "Bui Tien Thanh"
date: "May 9, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute:
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

## Overview

[Add assignment description here]

## Loading Packages

```{r}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse)
```

## Data Preparation

```{r}
# Load data
```

## Analysis

### Section 1

```{r}
# Your code here
```
